rationale: Two stale MEDIUM bugs (MED-14 faction defaults, MED-11 minigame selection) already fixed in code — marked completed. Created MerlinAmbientSystem: pure-function ambient calculator that blends biome art profiles + seasonal palettes + time-of-day tints + weather probabilities into a unified color set. Directly addresses creator feedback q-20260412-002 (ambiance changes with season and time of day).
next_cycle_plan: Wire MerlinAmbientSystem into Run3D scene controller. Connect to GameTimeManager.period_changed signal for automatic ambient updates during gameplay. Then start playtest core loop (TEST-PLAYTEST-1).
